issues.description: SearchDeck action is incorrect. The card effect requires looking at 4 cards from top of deck, revealing up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} card, and adding it to hand. SearchDeck does not capture the 'look at 4 cards' mechanic or the conditional reveal/add logic.
Filter is 'Any' but should specify {Straw Hat Crew} type requirement
Second effect with trigger='Trigger' and PlaySelf action is spurious and not supported by card text. There is no secondary trigger or self-play mechanic in the effect.
No mechanism to represent 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order'. The DSL lacks an action type to handle deck reordering/arrangement of non-selected cards.
